text:
Sensual geometry. Adorned with a blue or grey dial, the Hermès H08 Squelette explores materials while keeping the adventurous spirit of the original timepiece.
 
On view at Watches and Wonders Geneva 2026.
 
#HermesH08Squelette
#WatchesAndWonders2026
#HermesTime
#HermesWatches
#Hermes

A boundless horizon. Windows onto mysterious mechanisms, the Hermès H08 Squelette and Arceau Samarcande watches unveil their inner worlds at Watches and Wonders Geneva 2026.

#WatchesAndWonders2026
#HermesTime
#HermesWatches
#Hermes

Equestrian touch. Follow the stride on the Arceau Samarcande watch, as the sapphire horse’s head breathes light into the openwork dial.
 
Displayed at Watches and Wonders Geneva 2026.
 
#ArceauSamarcandeWatch
#WatchesAndWonders2026
#HermesTime
#HermesWatches

Inner harmony. Follow the rhythm of the new Arceau Samarcande watch, now showcased at Watches and Wonders Geneva 2026.

Inside out. Just as set designers use pulleys to transform a stage, the Hermès H08 Squelette and Arceau Samarcande watches display a complex structure to reveal their mysterious mechanisms to the outside world.

To be discovered at Watches and Wonders Geneva 2026.

#WatchesAndWonders2026
#HermesTime
#HermesWatches
#Hermes

Staging time. Starting tomorrow, the Hermès H08 will be showcased at Watches and Wonders Geneva 2026, playing with transparencies and architecture.
